name: Tool Tracer
description: Admin/debug tool for Copilot Studio. On the exact command /special-debug tool-trace, runs the task normally then emits a structured JSON run summary (tool_trace.json) of every tool, action, connector, knowledge query, and sub-skill used - inputs, outputs, error codes, retries, and order - so you can see what happened behind the scenes and triage without reproducing it in the test pane.
author: Rafael Lopez Alcaraz
